race.comment: PHILLIP ISLAND (7) is a maiden galloper resuming from a spell after finishing eighth over 1200m in The Showdown at Caulfield at the latest appearance on March 14. Trialled well and will enjoy the drop in class, go close. TOMMY'S LASS (13) has not appeared since racing on the speed on debut and finishing second over 1050m at Morphettville in February. Was well backed there and she too has trialled nicely, big danger. POCKETFULLOFCASH (8) is a Rich Enuff gelding from the stakes-winner Belwazi on debut. Impressive winner of a recent trial and the stable had him in a hot race on Saturday but opt here, wary. SODAPOP (9) is a colt by top sire Extreme Warrior on debut for the Sutton yard who can run well, as can ARTISON (17) first up for the Begg stable off an even debut.
